headline: Casey’s Announces Addition of Finance Leader Stanley J. Sutula III to its Board of Directors
summary: ANKENY, Iowa, June 08, 2026--Casey’s General Stores, Inc. (Nasdaq: CASY), the third largest convenience retailer and fifth largest pizza chain in the United States, today announced the appointment of Stanley J. Sutula III to its Board of Directors (the "Board").

headline: IBM AI Upskilling Push Tests Long Term Growth Story For Investors
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) has expanded its free IBM SkillsBuild program in the UK with a new AI learning pathway for workers at all career stages. The company is a founding partner in the UK government's AI Skills Hub, supporting a target to upskill 10 million workers by 2030. IBM also launched the global AI Builders Challenge, giving university students hands on experience building AI solutions with IBM tools. For investors watching IBM at a share price of $284.84, this push into AI training and...

headline: Jim Cramer on IBM: “I Like It Very Much, But It’s Up On a Spike”

headline: Can IBM Gain From Its Growing AI Collaboration With Google Cloud?
summary: IBM joins Google Cloud to launch a new consulting practice, pairing IBM Consulting Advantage with Gemini Enterprise AI to speed adoption and modernize systems.

headline: What's Happening With BigBear.ai Stock?
summary: BigBear.ai (BBAI) is a company telling very different stories right now.  A story is told by the stock ticker, which shows a return of -31.1% over the last six months, a period when the broader S&P 500 gained +10.0%.  Another story comes from management, which insists its strategy of providing “mission-ready AI” to national security and commercial clients is working.

headline: Semiconductor and Computing Veteran Nicholas Donofrio to Join Corvex Board of Directors as the Company Scales Secure AI Infrastructure and Prepares to Launch Token Factory
summary: Corvex, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOVE), an engineering-led AI computing platform specializing in GPU-accelerated infrastructure for AI workloads, today announced Nicholas M. Donofrio will join its Board of Directors upon election at the Company's upcoming annual meeting.

headline: New IBM Study Finds CIOs and CTOs Face Growing AI Control Gap as Enterprise Deployment Scales
summary: A new IBM (NYSE: IBM) Institute for Business Value study reveals that as AI moves from experimentation to enterprise-wide deployment, two-thirds of surveyed CIOs and CTOs report being held accountable for AI systems they do not fully control, while governance struggles to keep pace at scale.

raw.headline: New IBM Study Finds CIOs and CTOs Face Growing AI Control Gap as Enterprise Deployment Scales
